title: An Act prohibiting anticompetitive conduct and agreements and strengthening the Massachusetts Antitrust Act

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Rogers of Cambridge, a petition (subject to Joint Rule 12) of David M. Rogers and Andrea Campbell (Attorney General) relative to prohibiting anticompetitive conduct and agreements and strengthening the Massachusetts Antitrust Act.  The Judiciary.
